CVE-2016-3066.title: The spice-gtk widget allows remote authenticated users to obtain  ...
CVE-2016-3066.description: The spice-gtk widget allows remote authenticated users to obtain information from the host clipboard.

CVE-2017-12194.title: A flaw was found in the way spice-client processed certain messag ...
CVE-2017-12194.description: A flaw was found in the way spice-client processed certain messages sent from the server. An attacker, having control of malicious spice-server, could use this flaw to crash the client or execute arbitrary code with permissions of the user running the client. spice-gtk versions through 0.34 are believed to be vulnerable.

CVE-2020-14355.title: Multiple buffer overflow vulnerabilities were found in the QUIC i ...
CVE-2020-14355.description: Multiple buffer overflow vulnerabilities were found in the QUIC image decoding process of the SPICE remote display system, before spice-0.14.2-1. Both the SPICE client (spice-gtk) and server are affected by these flaws. These flaws allow a malicious client or server to send specially crafted messages that, when processed by the QUIC image compression algorithm, result in a process crash or potential code execution.
